title: [Proposal] Deprecate day-trading-mnq-mgc from core catalog and mark as optional pack
prompt:
[PROPOSAL EXECUTION] Executing approved proposal.
TITLE: Deprecate day-trading-mnq-mgc from core catalog and mark as optional pack
PRIORITY: low
TYPE: skill_evolution
SUMMARY: Apply conservative deprecation posture to day-trading-mnq-mgc by marking it optional and documenting non-removal pending telemetry review.
FULL IMPLEMENTATION PLAN:
Implement a non-destructive deprecation update.

Scope:
1. Update `skills/day-trading-mnq-mgc/SKILL.md` with deprecation notice indicating optional-pack status.
2. Keep skill intact (no hard deletion).
3. Add clear note that final removal requires usage telemetry review over one full quarterly cycle.
4. Ensure discoverability remains possible for users who still need it.

Acceptance:
- Skill is marked optional/deprecated with explicit review gate.
- No hard removal or broken references.


AFFECTED FILES:
  - [edit] skills/day-trading-mnq-mgc/SKILL.md: Add conservative deprecation/optional-pack status note and review gate.


DIFF PREVIEW / REFERENCE:
```
~ Add deprecation banner and optional-pack positioning; preserve full skill content for compatibility.
```

EXPECTED IMPACT: Reduces core-catalog clutter while avoiding accidental loss of potentially important niche workflows.
INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Read affected files with read_file first to understand current state.
2. Apply edits using find_replace or replace_lines.
3. For one-time parallel side work, use additive background primitives: background_spawn, background_status/background_progress, background_join.
4. Verify your changes are correct.
5. Report exactly what was changed and any issues encountered.
ADDITIONAL EXECUTOR INSTRUCTIONS:
Edit `skills/day-trading-mnq-mgc/SKILL.md` to add a clear deprecation/optional-pack status notice and a telemetry-based review gate for any future hard removal. Do not delete core content. Return the exact deprecation text added.
